lastSyncedNote: After 26.7.14 release: added a 'Courses & your golf story' group to the Casual Rounds card with course ratings & reviews (bi-star-fill), per-hole hole notes (bi-signpost-2-fill), profile Summary streaks + courses map (bi-map-fill), and the courses bucket list (bi-flag-fill). Note the homepage was restructured 6 cards to 4 (Tournaments, Leagues & Societies, Clubs, Casual Rounds) in commit e80774e just before this sync. Organizer-only items this release (skins gross-birdie tie option, manual winnings entries, hole-set/holes-to-play changes) judged too niche for the homepage; AI assistant expansion already represented from the prior sync.
